_comment: Real-shape mcp-proxy /call response captured live 2026-05-14 in the dev environment (k3s prod, namespace openagentic). The mcp-proxy now wraps openagentic_kubernetes.k8s_list_pods in the MCP standard envelope { content, structuredContent, isError } per the spec — content[] carries the text-rendered version for LLMs, structuredContent carries the parsed dict for programmatic access. The mcp_tool node executor surfaces this envelope verbatim, so downstream extract_key on 'structuredContent.pods' is the canonical typed-chain entry point. The pods array mixes 4 healthy (Running, restarts=0/12) with 1 unhealthy (Pending) so downstream filter_data (status neq Running) has exactly one row to flag — matches the harness fixture k8s_list_pods-real.json for cross-template equivalence.

content.text: Pods in namespace openagentic (5 total): openagentic-api (Running), openagentic-ui (Running), openagentic-workflows (Pending, 8 restarts), openagentic-mcp-proxy (Running, 12 restarts), harbor-redis (Running).
